summary: Role Management CRUD Testing - ALL FEATURES VERIFIED. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: Role Management UI fully functional including create role, permission matrix, and delete role.
passed_tests: GET /api/roles - Returns 200 with roles list, module_categories, and module_labels
GET /api/roles - Roles have correct structure with id, name, tenant_id (no _id)
POST /api/roles - Creates new role without ObjectId serialization error (BUG FIX VERIFIED)
POST /api/roles - Creates role with custom permissions
POST /api/roles - Returns 400 for duplicate role name
PUT /api/roles/{role_id} - Updates role permissions successfully
PUT /api/roles/{nonexistent} - Returns 404
DELETE /api/roles/{role_id} - Deletes custom role successfully
DELETE /api/roles/{system_role} - Returns 400 for system roles
DELETE /api/roles/{nonexistent} - Returns 404
GET /api/roles/{role_id} - Returns role details without _id
POST /api/roles/{role_id}/set-default - Sets role as default
UI: Tenant Settings page loads with Company, Branding, Modules, Roles, Settings tabs
UI: Roles tab shows Role Management component
UI: Create Role button opens dialog with name, description, is_default fields
UI: Role creation works - toast shows success, role appears in list
UI: Permission matrix shows expandable categories (Core, Reports, Operations, etc.)
UI: Checkboxes toggle for View, Create, Edit, Delete permissions
UI: System roles show lock icon (cannot be deleted)
UI: Custom roles can be deleted via delete button in role editor
critical_code_review_comments: roles.py: Line 115-118 correctly removes _id after insert_one (BUG FIX CONFIRMED)
roles.py: All find queries use {"_id": 0} projection to exclude MongoDB ObjectId
roles.py: System role protection works - is_system_role check prevents deletion
roles.py: Role name uniqueness check uses case-insensitive regex
RoleManagement.js: Proper data-testid attributes for testing
RoleManagement.js: Good UX with loading states, toast notifications
TenantSettings.js: Properly imports and renders RoleManagement component in Roles tab
seed_data_creation: Test roles created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Role Management feature fully tested. ObjectId serialization bug in POST /api/roles was fixed by adding role_doc.pop('_id', None) after insert_one. All CRUD operations work correctly. UI at /tenant-settings > Roles tab. System roles (Admin, Manager, etc.) cannot be deleted. Custom roles can be created, edited, and deleted.

verified_bug_fix.issue: POST /api/roles returned 500 error due to MongoDB ObjectId serialization
